column1: I__________up the tent after dinner, I promise. (PUT)
We'll have to wait. When Dennis__________up the tent, we___________lunch. (PUT/HAVE)
We can't unpack the rucksacks. Jonathan_______________up the tent yet. (NOT PUT)
I_____________you later. I_________still________up the tent. I___________________up the tent for an hour already. (HELP/PUT/PUT)
She said the boys____________up the tent an hour later. (PUT)
I think the tent______________up in an hour. (PUT)

- Who usually____________up the tent?

- The boys do. (PUT)
